---
name: Design feedback
about: Propose or review brand, logo, UI or social design direction
title: "Design: "
labels: design
assignees: ''
---

## Area

- [ ] Logo
- [ ] App icon
- [ ] Website / README visual
- [ ] UI / approval flow
- [ ] Social media asset
- [ ] Diagram / architecture visual
- [ ] Other

## Goal

What should this design communicate?

## Proposal

Describe the idea. Attach SVGs, PNGs or sketches if useful.

## Privacy/control meaning

How does the design make local-first behavior, approval or controlled delegation clearer?

## Brand safety

- [ ] Does not use Apple logos or Apple-owned visuals
- [ ] Does not imply Apple endorsement
- [ ] Does not include real private data
- [ ] Works as iGentic identity, not generic AI hype

## Accessibility

How does the design work in small sizes, monochrome or high contrast?

## Related files

Mention any relevant files, for example:

- `docs/brand/BRAND.md`
- `docs/brand/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md`
- `docs/brand/LOGO_BRIEF.md`
- `docs/brand/LOGO_USAGE.md`
